steps: Go to https://openweathermap.org/register and create a free account
Verify your email address via the confirmation email
A default API key is automatically created for your account
To create an additional key, enter a name in the 'Create key' form and click 'Generate'
Copy the API key and use it as the 'appid' query parameter in API requests

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key (APPID)
credential_fields.description: Your OpenWeatherMap API key (also called APPID), passed as the 'appid' query parameter

notes: Free tier available with 1,000 API calls/day and 60 calls/minute
The API key is passed as a query parameter (?appid=YOUR_KEY)
New API keys may take up to 2 hours to become active after account creation
One Call API 3.0 requires a separate subscription (pay-per-call after 1,000 free calls/day)
Historical weather data requires a paid plan

test_endpoint.description: Get current weather for London to verify the API key is valid
